summary: Completed frontend testing of CambridgeTestInterface.js for Part 3 question ordering and header buttons. All reported issues have been fixed: 1) Questions in Part 3 now display in correct order (Q21-22 multiple_selection → Q23-27 matching → Q28-30 multiple_choice), 2) Hide button is visible and functional in header for all sections, 3) Settings and Help buttons work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Question rendering in Part 3 uses map() to preserve original order from API - correctly shows Q21-22 (multiple_selection), Q23-27 (matching), Q28-30 (multiple_choice)
Hide button condition was removed (line 2186-2194) - now visible in all sections
Settings modal provides text size, color theme, and screen resolution options
Help modal has Information, Test help, and Task help tabs with example questions
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Cambridge IELTS 17 Test 2 data
context_for_next_testing_agent: CambridgeTestInterface.js Part 3 question ordering and header buttons tested. All features working: 1) Questions display in correct order (Q21-22 multiple_selection, Q23-27 matching, Q28-30 multiple_choice), 2) Hide button visible and functional, 3) Settings button opens modal with display options, 4) Help button opens modal with test information. Test flow: Login -> /cambridge-test/ielts17/test2?skill=listening -> Start -> Part 3

part3_question_order.details: Questions display in correct order: Q21-22 (multiple_selection with checkboxes), Q23-27 (matching with dropdown selectors), Q28-30 (multiple_choice with radio buttons)

hide_button.details: Hide button visible in header, shows 'Screen hidden' overlay with 'Resume test' button when clicked

settings_button.details: Opens modal with Text size (Standard/Large/Extra large), Colours (4 themes), Screen Resolution options

help_button.details: Opens modal with Information, Test help, Task help tabs showing example questions and instructions
